data.title: Home Repair Expert Bryan Harmon Explains the Benefits of a Handyman Package in HelloNation
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Indianapolis, Bryan Harmon of Ace Handyman Services discussed a solution for homeowners facing numerous small home repairs. Harmon highlighted the convenience of bundling these tasks into a single appointment. This tactic eliminates the need to schedule multiple visits, saving time and effort for the homeowner. The article on HelloNation underscored the importance of this approach, with Harmon emphasizing the efficiency and effectiveness of addressing various repairs in one go. This strategy not only streamlines the process but also offers a cost-effective solution for individuals seeking to tackle multiple home maintenance issues.

data.title: Condé Nast closes Self Magazine and international Glamour editions in Germany, Spain, Mexico.
data.description: The well-known publishing company is shutting down the international versions of Glamour Magazine in three countries, including Germany, Spain, and Mexico.

data.title: Cast Aside the Clouds Premieres in New York May 18
data.description: A romantic tale unfolding in contemporary Iran urges viewers to reflect independently. Noteworthy points: Debut in the United States on May 18 in New York City, then screenings in New York and Los Angeles. The film presents a compelling love story in modern Tehran, providing a unique and close look into daily life.

data.title: Elijah Craig Launches 108-Proof 2026 PGA Championship Commemorative Edition Bourbon
data.description: A new limited edition bourbon, crafted in small batches at 108 proof, has been unveiled in Bardstown, Kentucky. This special release pays homage to the 108th playing of the PGA Championship. Elijah Craig, designated as the Official Bourbon of the 2026 PGA Championship, revealed the details of its commemorative edition for the event.

data.title: Noble 33 Appoints Michelin Star Veteran Chef Lee Bennett as Vice President of Culinary
data.description: Alumni of renowned chefs Gordon Ramsay and Alain Ducasse have been chosen to lead the culinary program across Noble 33's expanding international portfolio. The hospitality group based in Dallas made the announcement on April 16, 2026. Chef Lee Bennett has been appointed as the Vice President of Culinary, bringing a wealth of experience and expertise to oversee the culinary operations. The move is part of Noble 33's strategic growth plan, with the aim to maintain high standards and innovation across their establishments worldwide.

data.title: BNY Stock Hits 52-Week High - Here's Why
data.description: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE: BK) exceeded analyst expectations in the first quarter of 2026. The bank reported a 42% increase in diluted EPS to $2.24 from $1.58 and an adjusted EPS of $2.25, surpassing estimates of $1.93. Total revenue reached a record $5.409 billion, up 13% from the previous year and beating estimates of $5.180 billion. The pre-tax operating margin grew to 37% from 32%, and the return on tangible common equity rose to 29.3% from 24.2%. CEO Robin Vince highlighted the strong performance, stating that the bank experienced broad-based growth across its Securities Services and Market and Wealth Services businesses. Additionally, the bank achieved over 800 basis points of positive operating leverage and made investments in new products, capabilities, AI, and workforce development.

data.title: Nas.com Raises $27M Series A Led by Khosla Ventures as AI Unleashes the Biggest Wave of New Business Creation in History
data.description: A cutting-edge AI platform, which assists in business development, marketing, and customer acquisition, has gained a staggering 3.5 million members and achieved a remarkable fivefold increase in revenue in 2025. The venture was spearheaded by Khosla Ventures, accompanied by support from 500 Global and various strategic angel investors. In a recent announcement dated April 16, 2026, Nas.com, the innovative AI platform, revealed these impressive statistics.

data.title: Cora Expands Period Care Portfolio with Two New Products
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in San Francisco, Cora, a prominent brand specializing in natural period care, unveiled two innovative products. The first product is The Applicator-Free Tampon, which will be launched on Earth Day. This unique tampon provides convenient pocket-sized protection and stands out as the first of its kind in the market. It aims to promote sustainability and offers a new solution for consumers seeking eco-friendly period care.

data.title: Ipsos reports strong commercial performance despite a dip in organic growth in the first quarter. #update #Q1
data.description: In the latest data update, it was reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million globally with the death toll surpassing 300,000. The United States continues to lead in both confirmed cases and deaths, with over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. Other heavily affected countries include Russia, Brazil, Spain, and the UK. Despite efforts to flatten the curve, the virus continues to pose a significant threat worldwide. Policymakers and health officials are emphasizing the importance of following guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and protect public health.

data.title: Vibrant Ingredients Continues Strategic Growth and Community Impact Under CEO Vince Macciocchi
data.description: In Lake Mary, Florida, on April 16, 2026, Vibrant Ingredients, the leading natural ingredient supplier owned by private equity, is experiencing significant growth and progress since CEO Vince Macciocchi took the helm in 2024. During his tenure, the company has seen a notable shift in direction and positive momentum.

data.title: Illinois American Water and American Water Charitable Foundation Provide Over $1.2 Million in Community Support Across Illinois in 2025
data.description: In Belleville, Illinois on April 16, 2026, Illinois American Water released its Community Impact Report revealing that in 2025, the company allocated over $785,000 in charitable donations. This total sum was distributed through grants, general charitable contributions, and programming support to benefit 195...

data.title: Walmart Expands Access to Weight Management Support Services for Customers on or exploring GLP-1s
data.description: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart is enhancing its Better Care Services platform to meet the increasing demand for weight management and overall health assistance. Through this platform, customers can access virtual care, nutrition services, and pharmacy resources in a unified experience. By integrating curated third-party providers with pharmacy services, nutrition guidance, and delivery choices, Better Care Services now offers weight management support to customers on or offline.
